mapper.select: select keyword_id, keyword, scene, sort_no, status, effect_time_range, synonym_text, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted from search_operations where keyword_id = #{keywordId} and deleted = false
mapper.update: update search_operations set keyword = #{keyword}, scene = #{scene}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, status = #{status}, effect_time_range = #{effectTimeRange}, synonym_text = #{synonymText}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, deleted = #{deleted} where keyword_id = #{keywordId} and deleted = false
